title: Occupational Health and Safety Policy
scenario: Create a comprehensive occupational health and safety policy for a manufacturing facility, including procedures for hazard identification, risk assessment, and control. The policy should address potential risks and vulnerabilities, as well as implementation and maintenance requirements. The target output should be a detailed, 5-page document with clear headings, concise paragraphs, and numbered lists.
constraints: Must include at least 10 different occupational health and safety protocols
Must be written from the perspective of an occupational health and safety officer

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated policy adheres to the specified constraints and format.
The policy covers all required occupational health and safety protocols for the manufacturing facility.
The policy is easy to understand and free of unnecessary information.
The policy is properly formatted and structured using a standard occupational health and safety policy template.
